features.name: Migration to single uploads/ folder + drop /images mount
Media library backend + reusable popup component
Wire 6 admin image fields to openMediaLibrary()

checks: node --check config/migrate_to_uploads.js
node --check app.js
ls images/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l   # expect 0 after run (or N legitimate collisions logged)

mysql -e 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services WHERE image_path LIKE "/images/%" OR (image_path != "" AND image_path NOT LIKE "/uploads/%" AND image_path NOT LIKE "data:%" AND image_path NOT LIKE "http%")' sellingweb   # expect 0
test $(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:5500/images/anything.jpg) -eq 404
test $(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:5500/uploads/main.jpg) -eq 200
Manual: re-run migration → all moves and rewrites = 0
node --check Controllers/mediaController.js
node --check Views/admin/script.js
test $(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:5500/api/admin/media) -eq 401
Login + curl -b cookie http://localhost:5500/api/admin/media → success:true, data array sorted by mtime desc
Manual: open admin → DevTools → openMediaLibrary({mode:'single', onSelect: u => console.log(u)}) → modal visible with grid
Manual: search 'service' in popup → grid filters
Manual: click thumb → highlighted; Confirm enabled → click → console logs URL
Manual: Upload new image via popup → appears at top of grid; cleared search; in multi-mode auto-selected
grep -c 'openMediaLibrary(' Views/admin/script.js   # >= 6
grep -c 'logo-file-input\|main-image-file-input\|svc-file-input\|fp-file-input\|project-media-input' Views/admin/index.html Views/admin/script.js   # 0 (or close to 0)
grep -c 'URL.createObjectURL' Views/admin/script.js   # 0
Manual: Settings logo → Chọn ảnh logo → pick → preview updates → live-preview iframe refreshes → Save → reload persists
Manual: Project edit → Add Image (multi) → pick 3 → 3 thumbs added to project → Save → reload → 3 tableimages rows in DB
Manual: Same image picked twice across Settings + Services → uploads/ file count unchanged → both DB rows point at same /uploads/x.jpg URL
